Let's Get Started

Complete these 3 steps to start matching payments.

Upload Invoice Report
Open invoices / account open items used for invoice application — XLSX, CSV
2✓
Upload Delivery Report
Delivery, tracking, bill of lading, logistics memo, PO, and sales order bridge — XLSX, CSV
3✓
Upload Bank File
BAI2, CSV, Excel, PDF, or bank summary
4✓
Upload Remittance Details
Customer remittance with invoice, tracking, PO, and delivery references — XLSX, CSV, PDF

Settings
Account · Role · Matching engine · Appearance · Plans & Pricing
Account
First Name
Last Name
Email
Role
Controls access to features and workflows
⚠️ CFO role can only be assigned by your Company Admin.
Timezone
Auto-switch light/dark theme based on local time of day ·
Matching Engine — Priority Order
Drag to reorder · use arrows to move rules · toggle to enable/disable · higher priority runs first
Matching Parameters
Amount tolerance ($)
Max variance to still consider an exact match
📋 Import Mapping Templates
Map your file columns to AR Match Pro fields. Save templates per file type so imports auto-detect the right columns.
⚙️ Matching Rule Priority
Rules run top-to-bottom. Toggle, reorder, or disable rules. Changes take effect on next Auto Match run.
🎯 Matching Tolerances
Dollar variance ($)
Max $ difference for an exact match
Percentage variance (%)
Max % difference for a fuzzy match
Short-pay threshold ($)
Variances below this are flagged as short pays
Bank fee threshold ($)
Variances at or below this may be bank fees
Rounding tolerance ($)
Tiny differences treated as rounding, not exceptions
🏷️ Customer Name Normalization
Bank files often truncate or alter customer names. Map bank aliases to canonical names so matching works correctly.
📤 ERP Export Profile
Choose which format the Posting Export uses. Fields always exported: Invoice #, Customer Account, Amount, Payment Date, Bank Reference.
Active export profile

Current plan
Demo
⚙️ System Configuration
Field mappings, matching rules, and export profiles. Defaults work out of the box — extend per customer organization without code changes.

Save and switch between configurations for different organizations
ERP export format
Format used when exporting the posting file

View, export, or import the full configuration
